gui.category.chat.compact_chat.name: Compact Chat
gui.category.chat.compact_chat_time.desc: time in seconds during which duplicate messages are merged.
gui.category.chat.compact_chat_time.name: Compact Chat Duration
gui.category.chat.peek_chat.description: allows viewing chat without opening the screen.
gui.category.chat.peek_chat.name: Peek Chat
gui.category.chat.scroll_peek_chat.descr: allows scrolling through chat while peeking chat.
gui.category.chat.scroll_peek_chat.name: Scroll Peek Chat
gui.category.chat.skip_command_confirmat: skips command confirmation prompts caused by missing client-side command permissions.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.d: shows an outline of the Etherwarp destination.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.i: change the color used for a invalid etherwarp.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.v: change the color used for a valid etherwarp.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.w: change the outline width for etherwarping.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_admin.d: Changes the scale of Admin items depending on rarity.
Changes the scale of Common items depending on rarity.
Changes the scale of Divine items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_epic.de: Changes the scale of Epic items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_legenda: Changes the scale of Legendary items depending on rarity.
Changes the scale of Mythic items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_rare.de: Changes the scale of Rare items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_scaling: changes the scale of dropped items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_special: Changes the scale of Special items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_ultimat: Changes the scale of Ultimate items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_uncommo: Changes the scale of Uncommon items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.item_rarity_very_sp: Changes the scale of Very Special items depending on rarity.
gui.category.visuals.old_master_star_col: changes master starred item names to the old star formatting
